title: PM KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Financial benefit of ₹6000 per year to small and marginal farmer families

title: National Scholarship Portal
description: Central Sector Scholarship for meritorious students
eligibility: Meritorious students with family income less than ₹6 lakh

title: Ayushman Bharat Scheme
description: Health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year

title: PMEGP (Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme)
description: Financial assistance for starting new enterprises
benefits: Subsidy up to 35% for general category
eligibility: 18+ years, 8th pass for projects above ₹10 lakh

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child education and marriage
eligibility: Parents/guardians of girl child below 10 years

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Housing for All by 2024

title: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
description: Free electricity through solar rooftop installations
benefits: Subsidy up to ₹78,000 for solar panels

title: National Pension Scheme for Traders/Self-Employed
description: Pension scheme for small shopkeepers and self-employed

title: Khelo India Scheme
description: Promote sports and identify young talent
benefits: Financial support up to ₹5 lakh per athlete

title: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore
eligibility: SC/ST or women entrepreneurs above 18 years

title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Maternity benefit for pregnant women

title: National Health Mission
description: Comprehensive healthcare services for rural and urban areas

title: Rooftop Solar Programme Phase II
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Financial assistance for rooftop solar installations

title: KUSUM Scheme (Solar Pumps for Farmers)
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Solar water pumps for farmers

title: PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
description: Secondary and tertiary healthcare coverage
benefits: ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization

title: Mission Indradhanush
description: Universal immunization program for children and pregnant women
eligibility: Children under 2 years and pregnant women

title: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
description: Affordable generic medicines at special stores

title: Target Olympic Podium Scheme (TOPS)
description: Special support to Olympic medal hopefuls
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹50 lakh per athlete
eligibility: Athletes with potential to win Olympic medals

title: National Sports Development Fund
description: Financial support for sports infrastructure and training
benefits: Funding for equipment, coaching, and facilities

title: Fit India Movement
description: Promoting fitness and healthy lifestyle
